stat_block.text: Hide shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Specialized tanning techniques combined with tough hides from creatures such as griffons result in these particularly tough shields. The hardened hide of the shield still has enough flexibility to diminish the impact of battering and pummeling attacks.

traits.name: Deflecting
traits.text: This shield is designed to block or divert certain types of attacks or weapons. Increase the shield's Hardness against the listed type of attack by 2.
